# Testing Best Practices

> Proven patterns for test configuration, coverage, and test architecture across frameworks.

## Entries

- [Vitest Configuration for Monorepos](vitest-monorepo-config.md): Per-package Vitest configs with Turborepo orchestration. RECOMMENDED.
- [Playwright E2E Testing](playwright-e2e.md): Cross-browser E2E testing with auto-start dev server. OPTIONAL.
